infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: FlightFits uses your photo library so you can add closet items, outfits, and travel inspiration.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: FlightFits uses your camera so you can photograph closet items and outfits.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow FlightFits to access your photos so you can add closet items and outfits.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow FlightFits to use your camera so you can photograph closet items and outfits.
